sourceList.title: Thomas II of Savoy, “Índice Find A Grave”
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - THOMAS de Savoie (Château de Montmélian [1202]-Chambéry 7 Feb 1259, bur Aosta Cathedral).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - THOMAS de Savoie, son of THOMAS I Comte de Savoie & his wife Marguerite [Beatrix] de Genève (Château de Montmélian [1202]-Chambéry 7 Feb 1259, bur Aosta Cathedral).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de SAVOIE II於大約1199年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊蒙特梅利安時，他的父親Thomas de Savoie I22歲，母親Marguerite de Genève20歲。他於1237年4月2日與Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特結婚。他去世於1259年2月7日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾享年61歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特奧斯塔奧斯塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de SAVOIE II于大约1199年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊蒙特梅利安时，他的父亲Thomas de Savoie I22岁，母亲Marguerite de Genève20岁。他于1237年4月2日与Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特结婚。他去世于1259年2月7日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾享年61岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特奧斯塔奧斯塔。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SAVOIE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de SAVOIE II was born about 1199, in Montmélian, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Thomas de Savoie I, was 22 and his mother, Marguerite de Genève, was 20. He married Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut on 2 April 1237, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium. He died on 7 February 1259, in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Aosta, Aosta, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de SAVOIE II est né environ 1199, à Montmélian, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Thomas de Savoie I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Genève, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut le 2 avril 1237, à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique. Il est décédé le 7 février 1259, à Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Aosta, Aosta, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de SAVOIE II um 1199 in Montmélian, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Savoie I 22 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Genève 20. Er hat am 2. April 1237 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut geheiratet. Er starb am 7. Februar 1259 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Aosta, Aosta, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de SAVOIE II è nato il circa 1199 nel Montmélian, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Thomas de Savoie I, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Genève, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut il 2 aprile 1237, nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio. Morì il 7 febbraio 1259, nel Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Aosta, Aosta, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de SAVOIE IIが約1199年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイモントムeリアンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Savoie Iは22歳，母Marguerite de Genèveは20歳であった。1237年4月2日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントでJeanne de Flanders et Hainautと結婚した。彼は1259年2月7日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-パエレ-デ-クウルティルで61歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントアオスタアオスタにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de SAVOIE II(이)가 대략 1199년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 몽e리언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Savoie I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Genève(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1237년 4월 2일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1259년 2월 7일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-피레-데-커틸에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 아스타 아스타에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de SAVOIE II nasceu aproximadamente 1199, em Montmélian, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Thomas de Savoie I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Genève, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut em 2 de abril de 1237, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1259, em Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Aosta, Aosta, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de SAVOIE II родился около 1199 г. в местности монтмeлян, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Thomas de Savoie I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Genève, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut 2 апреля 1237 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. Он умер 7 февраля 1259 г. в местности сеинт-пьирре-де-куртилл, савои, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности аоста, аоста, пиемонт, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de SAVOIE II nació aproximadamente 1199, en Montmélian, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Thomas de Savoie I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Genève, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Flanders et Hainaut el 2 de abril de 1237, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1259, en Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Aosta, Aosta, Piemonte, Italia.
